mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.role_id, p.module_key, p.dept_id, r.role_name, r.role_key FROM mem_mp_role_module p LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON p.role_id = r.role_id
mapper.select: WHERE p.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY p.module_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mem_mp_role_module (role_id, module_key, dept_id) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{moduleKey}, #{deptId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mem_mp_role_module WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id AS roleId, role_name AS roleName, role_key AS roleKey FROM sys_role WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' ORDER BY role_sort, role_id
